title: Head of Information Technology- UAE National
Vice President - Identity & Security Specialist Sales, EEMEA Regional Lead
description:
**Our Purpose**

*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*

**Title and Summary**

Vice President - Identity & Security Specialist Sales, EEMEA Regional LeadVice President, Identity and Security Specialist Sakes, EEMEA Regional Lead
  
  
Overview
  
Mastercard’s Security Solutions organization (SSO) develops and delivers world-class risk and security products & services for Mastercard customers across the globe. The teams within this organization lead the creation and delivery of innovative solutions enabling consumers to experience simple yet secure digital experiences, however, and wherever they choose to interact. This regional VP role will lead the execution of the go-to-market (GTM) strategy for identity, fraud, and other select security products, driving scale, retention, and growth across a regional client base.
  
  
Role Purpose
  
This Vice President will lead the EEMEA regional Specialist Sales team for Mastercard’s Identity and Security portfolio. The VP will be accountable for new business, adoption, revenue growth, and operational excellence across both new logo acquisition and existing client expansion.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
  
Strategic Leadership
  

* Execute GTM strategy for Mastercard’s Identity, Financial Crimes, Fraud Solutions and Cyber for Payments product lines.
* Support the transformation of the sales model to unlock accelerated growth.
* Partner across the regional SSO business with the Ethoca, Risk Recon, and Recorded Future Sales teams, as well as across the entire regional Services business, to cross-sell and drive leads for other parts of the business.
* Collaborate with the B2B Marketing team and Lead Generation to ensure a robust funnel of opportunities and manage the development of those marketing-influenced deals from the top of the funnel all the way through close.
* Navigate across the region, SSO commercialization and product teams to develop and prioritize sales enablement activities.
* Deliver breakthrough employee experiences and create new opportunities for personal and collective growth

  
Business Development
  

* Serve as a player‑coach, leading a sales team to exceed collective quota while consistently delivering against individual targets.
* Accountable for ensuring that established sales pipeline, bookings, and revenue targets are met for the business.
* Align sales teams with customer priorities and goals and ensure measurable impact on revenue
* Collaborate closely with the Partnership team on our partner relationships within the region as well as the Customer Success organization ensuring strong relationships with the existing customer base
* Partner with sales leadership to build and maintain high-quality sales pipeline to enable accurate forecasting.
* Establish scalable processes for onboarding, support, and lifecycle management across the region.
* Build, coach, and certify a team of world-class sales leaders and account executives globally.

  
Qualifications
  

* Solid knowledge and understanding of financial services, eCommerce and/or digital security market landscape, solutions and use cases.
* Proven track record of selling and growing software, SaaS, or technology solutions into enterprise organizations with experience in risk, fraud, security, or identity services preferred.
* History of consistently exceeding sales targets as an individual contributor and manager, with a strong ability to motivate, coach and develop a team.
* Ability to focus and execute in a changing environment; ability to make things happen.
* Deep understanding of analytics, data, predictive modeling, and/or business intelligence preferred.
* Strong executive presence with ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders and C-suite clients.
* Strong executive selling and business development skills; proven ability to understand different partner GTM and organizational models.
* Demonstrated ability to manage, grow, and nurture team members, cultivating their career paths and goals
* Experience managing large-scale organizational transformation and talent redeployment.
* Experience navigating complex matrix environments and regional reporting structures.

**Corporate Security Responsibility**

All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

title: Director Solution Specialist - Third Party Risk
description:
At Moody's, we unite the brightest minds to turn today’s risks into tomorrow’s opportunities. We do this by striving to create an inclusive environment where everyone feels welcome to be who they are—with the freedom to exchange ideas, think innovatively, and listen to each other and customers in meaningful ways. Moody’s is transforming how the world sees risk. As a global leader in ratings and integrated risk assessment, we’re advancing AI to move from insight to action—enabling intelligence that not only understands complexity but responds to it. We decode risk to unlock opportunity, helping our clients navigate uncertainty with clarity, speed, and confidence.

If you are excited about this opportunity but do not meet every single requirement, please apply! You still may be a great fit for this role or other open roles. We are seeking candidates who model our values: invest in every relationship, lead with curiosity, champion diverse perspectives, turn inputs into actions, and uphold trust through integrity.

**Skills and Competencies**

* 10+ years of experience in a client-facing, pre-sales, or consulting role within the information services, data analytics, or enterprise software industries
* Proven technical expertise in third-party risk management, supplier risk management, AML/Financial Crime compliance or enterprise risk data solutions
* Demonstrated experience in solution architecture, including end to end data workflow design and multisource integration
* Deep understanding of structured and semi-structured data and formats including JSON, XML and CSV and past experience with SQL, Python, or APIs for data integration is encouraged
* Proficiency in artificial intelligence concepts, with a strong understanding of GenAI. Hands-on experience using AI tools to streamline workflows is highly desirable
* Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage effectively with both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Comfortable in a fast-paced environment, and demonstrated ability to work in a high-pressure, deadline-oriented environment
* This position offers a dynamic work environment, requiring up to 50% travel to engage with clients face-to-face, while also providing the flexibility of hybrid working

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Data Analytics, Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field is required as a minimum

**Responsibilities**

Serve as the functional and technical expert and design the solution to address client needs through Moody’s products and capabilities in AML/KYC and Data Management and AI solutions. Key responsibilities include:

* Serve as the functional and technical subject matter expert, designing solutions that address client needs using Moody’s AML, KYC, data management, and AI capabilities
* Partner with frontline sales teams and Industry Practice Leads as the pre-sales lead for Moody’s data, KYC, and third-party risk solutions
* Track evolving global and regional regulatory requirements related to third-party risk management and KYC, translating them into solution-led client strategies
* Lead client discovery sessions to define optimal solution architectures, data integration approaches, and governance frameworks
* Develop and deliver tailored solution designs, proof-of-concept demonstrations, and technical presentations that showcase Moody’s value proposition
* Lead and contribute to complex RFI and RFP responses, supporting opportunities from qualification through solution alignment and deal closure
* Act as a bridge between clients, sales, and product teams, providing structured market feedback to inform product innovation and roadmap development

**About the team**

By joining this team, you will work in a high-impact, collaborative environment at the forefront of innovation, helping clients navigate complexity while driving sustainable growth for Moody’s. The team designs data-driven risk intelligence solutions and partners closely with Industry Practice Leads to deliver technically executable, commercially viable outcomes.

Moody’s is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender expression, gender identity or any other characteristic protected by law.  
  
Candidates for Moody's Corporation may be asked to disclose securities holdings pursuant to Moody’s Policy for Securities Trading and the requirements of the position. Employment is contingent upon compliance with the Policy, including remediation of positions in those holdings as necessary.
company_description: In a world shaped by increasingly interconnected risks, Moody’s helps customers develop a holistic view of these risks to advance their business and act decisively.

title: Regional Director - APAC (Remote)
description:
We are a fast-growing, research-driven company building an artificial intelligence that helps online publishers overcome the challenges they face every day. Using novel AI, we are revolutionising the publishing industry and have a track record of building things that others have ruled out as impossible. Leading names from around the world rely on our product every day, including The Times, Le Monde, The Guardian, Vogue and many more.

Our team is our best asset. We work with extremely smart and talented individuals, who all enjoy a high degree of responsibility and independence in structuring their work.

Do you think you have what it takes to be part of Echobox? We'd love to hear from you.

**About the Role**:

We are looking for a Sales Manager to lead our business development in the APAC region. This dual-focus role gives you full ownership of the customer lifecycle—balancing new business acquisition with customer retention and upsell initiatives.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Revenue Growth: Growing revenue through upselling, cross-selling, and renewals.
* Relationship Building: Establishing trust and building strong relationships with key stakeholders.
* Customer Advocacy: Representing the customer's interests and ensuring their needs are communicated effectively within the company.
* Strategic Planning: Collaborating with customers to understand their long-term goals and aligning our products to meet those goals.
* Contract Management: Handling contract negotiations, renewals, and any changes to the customer's subscription or service agreement.
* Customer Feedback: Gathering customer feedback and insights to drive product improvements.

**Requirements:**

* Fluent written and spoken English
* 5+ years of experience in a Sales role
* Experience managing and leading others in a professional environment
* A customer-focused mindset, putting customer experience first in every action you take
* Track record of using data and reporting to guide decision making
* The ability to translate complicated concepts to non-technical people, while maintaining the ability to speak to highly technical people
* Exceptional account management and customer service skills backed up with excellent written and verbal communication skills
* A natural problem solver who is able to dissect an issue and develop a plan to address this

**Preferred Requirements:**

* Experience working in a fast paced B2B SaaS organisation.
* Excellent organisational and analytical skills, with proven ability to take initiative and build strong, productive relationships.
* An interest in artificial intelligence and the future of the publishing industry.

title: Head of Global Marketing (Brand & B2B Demand Generation)
description:
### **Head of Global Marketing (Brand & B2B Demand Generation)**

**Reports to:** CEO

**Team Size:** ~6 Members (Mix of full-time/part-time: Content writers, copywriters, designers, videographers, performance marketer). Working in Dubai office and remote.

#### **1. Role Overview**

We are a global Immersive Aerial Experience Studio transitioning from a drone-light-show startup to a premium, multi-technology entertainment company. We operate across the Middle East, Europe, and the Americas, selling highly customized, six-figure ($50k - $100k+) shows to corporate entities, governments, and mega-event organizers.

We are seeking a **"Brand & Growth Hybrid"** to lead our global marketing. You must possess the creative "eye" to maintain our premium, luxury aesthetic across visual channels (like Instagram), while possessing the analytical "math" to build a rigorous B2B demand-generation funnel. You will direct an existing 6-person creative and performance team, shifting their output from "B2C awareness" to targeted, revenue-generating B2B campaigns.

#### **2. Core Responsibilities**

**A. The "Luxury Storefront" (Brand Validation & Creative Direction)**

* **Creative Quality Control:** Act as the "Brand Guardian." Direct our videographers and designers to ensure every Instagram Reel, YouTube video, and pitch deck feels like a luxury service that justifies a $50,000 - $100,000+ price tag.
* **The Visual Portfolio:** Strategically own our Instagram and visual platforms. Ensure they serve as the ultimate, high-end portfolio that instantly validates our credibility when a VIP client looks us up after a sales pitch.
* **Global Localization:** Adapt our visual and written brand for different cultural touchpoints, seamlessly managing localized campaigns for Dubai, Brazil, and Europe in multiple languages.

**B. The "VIP Sales Engine" (B2B Demand Generation & ToFu Steering)**

* **Sales Alignment:** Work directly with the CEO and (regional) Sales Director to define Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs). Transform the marketing department into a Top-of-Funnel (ToFu) machine that feeds the sales team.
* **Targeted Campaign Execution:** Oversee the performance marketer to run highly targeted Meta and Google ad campaigns aimed specifically at B2B decision-makers (Event Directors, PR Agencies, Government Tourism Boards).
* **Metrics & ROI:** Shift to Marketing Qualified Leads (MQLs), Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), and overall pipeline revenue generated.
* **Market Intelligence & Expansion:** Identify new markets, analyze customer segments, and monitor competitors to support strategic expansion and strengthen Cyberdrone’s global market position.

**C. Executive Thought Leadership, PR, & Events**

* **Personal Branding:** Manage the LinkedIn presence and personal branding of the CEO and key Sales Team members, positioning them as international thought leaders in immersive entertainment technology.
* **High-Value B2B Channels:** Pivot focus toward channels that close enterprise deals: secure speaking slots at major industry panels, negotiate PR placements in event-industry trade magazines, and strategize direct-mail/face-to-face VIP events and exhibition presence.
* **Strategic Partnerships & Sponsorships:** Develop and manage strategic partnerships, sponsorships, and collaborations that enhance brand exposure, credibility, and access to new markets and audiences.

#### **3. Technical Requirements & Skills**

* **The "Dual-Brain" Marketer:** Must demonstrate both high-end creative taste (video/design direction) and rigorous analytical skills (CRM data, ROI calculation, ad-spend optimization).
* **B2B / Enterprise Experience:** Proven track record of marketing high-ticket services or products. You know how to market to a corporate Board or a major event agency.
* **Team Leadership:** Experience managing and extracting the best work from creative specialists (videographers, designers, writers).
* **Multichannel Fluency:** Deep understanding of how to take one core piece of content (e.g., a drone show recap video) and adapt it for Instagram (brand), LinkedIn (lead gen), and PR (authority).

**Requirements:**

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field.
* 7–10 years of marketing experience, including a senior or leadership role.
* Proven experience in B2B marketing and demand generation, preferably for high-value services or technology.
* Strong track record in brand development combined with revenue-driven marketing.
* Experience working closely with sales teams and managing enterprise sales funnels.
* Demonstrated experience leading and developing a marketing team.
* Analytical mindset with experience using data and KPIs to guide strategy.
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

**Employment conditions:**

* Visa and health insurance (if employed in Dubai)
* Competitive salary (includes housing- and commute allowance)
* Annual flight ticket to home country
* 24 days of vacation leave (excluding public holidays)
* Fulltime (40 hours/week)
